title: Quebec investors, entrepreneurs and self-employed persons: Who can apply - Canada.ca
content:
The requirements to apply depend on whether you’re:
- an investor (opens in a new tab)
- an entrepreneur (opens in a new tab)
- a self-employed person (opens in a new tab)
If you are eligible, submit an application to the Ministère de l’Immigration, de la Francisation et de l’Intégration (MIFI) , according to the program that applies to your situation.
If your application is successful, you can then apply for permanent residence.
